name: PT Minna Padi Investama Sekuritas Tbk
summary: PT Minna Padi Investama Sekuritas Tbk engages in the securities brokerage and underwriting activities in Indonesia. It offers trading and brokerage services for equity or debt securities in the secondary market; underwriting services for initial public offerings and rights issues, bonds, and other convertible bonds, as well as acts as an arranger in private placements; and corporate finance services, such as financial advisory, restructuring, and merger and acquisition services. The company was formerly known as PT Minna Padi Investama Tbk and changed its name to PT Minna Padi Investama Sekuritas Tbk in March 2017. PT Minna Padi Investama Sekuritas Tbk was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
